reforms.description: Denmark aims to lower barriers for entrepreneurs and innovators to foster a more dynamic business environment, enhancing the startup ecosystem.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Lowering barriers for entrepreneurs is expected to stimulate innovation and economic activity.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet legislated.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to create a more dynamic business environment, though it is not a structural overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: The programme aims for: Lower barriers for entrepreneurs and innovators.

reforms.description: The Danish government is stimulating business-financed research and development to enhance innovation capacity in the private sector.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Stimulating business-financed R&D is expected to enhance innovation capacity and productivity in the private sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been officially announced but not yet legislated.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform is significant as it aims to enhance innovation capacity through increased R&D funding, though it is not a major structural change.
reforms.source_quote: The programme aims for: Stimulating business-financed research and development.
